Client_Init.usage:
import { PachcaClient } from "@pachca/sdk"

const client = new PachcaClient("YOUR_TOKEN")

ChatOperations_listChats.usage:
const response = client.chats.listChats({
  availability: ChatAvailability.IsMember,
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example",
  sortField: "example",
  sortOrder: SortOrder.Asc
})

ChatOperations_getChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, isChannel: boolean, isPublic: boolean, createdAt: string, memberIds?: number[] })

ChatOperations_createChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, isChannel: boolean, isPublic: boolean, createdAt: string, memberIds?: number[] })

ChatOperations_updateChat.usage:
const request: ChatUpdateRequest = { chat: { name: "example", public: true } }
const response = client.chats.updateChat(123, request)
ChatOperations_updateChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, isChannel: boolean, isPublic: boolean, createdAt: string, memberIds?: number[] })
